title: <div>  •  Students must submit a 250-word reflection explaining how their creati
content:
• Students must submit a 250-word reflection explaining how their creative piece deepens their understanding of the literature.

✅ Why This Works:
• Allows visually and creatively inclined students to thrive.
• Encourages deep, imaginative engagement with literature.
• Adds more personal and interactive investment in the final project.

📌 Weekly Creative Extra Credit Option:

Each week, students can submit a creative engagement task for extra credit. Examples:
• Week 3 (Gothic Horror): Write a 1-page unreliable narrator story.
• Week 5 (Modernism): Create a stream-of-consciousness poem.
• Week 8 (Postmodernism): Write a fictional encyclopedia entry for a made-up concept.

✅ Why This Works:
• Keeps engagement dynamic for those who want to go beyond the readings.
• No pressure—entirely optional.
• Rewards curiosity and exploration.
